news.title: ACE联合其他协会敦促GSA撤销关于'非法DEI'的拟议认证要求
news.summary_en: ACE, other associations say a Trump administration proposal to require all federal funding recipients to certify they do not have unlawful DEI programs and practices would create significant uncertainty for institutions.
news.original_title: ACE, Other Associations Urge GSA to Rescind Proposed Certification Requirements on “Unlawful DEI” and Other Issues
news.summary_cn: 美国教育委员会（ACE）联合其他高等教育协会致函联邦总务管理局（GSA），呼吁撤销关于'非法多元化、公平与包容（DEI）'的拟议认证要求。ACE表示，该要求界定模糊，将给高校合规带来不确定性。
